suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that parser work in this flake should prefer Menhir standard mode unless MenhirLib is explicitly added, because the current environment does not provide MenhirLib by default.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for phase-2-parser-ast-and-syntax-diagnostics cites worker session 5524efed-9399-439c-932e-405f2820c19f encountering missing MenhirLib and switching to standard Menhir mode successfully.
